dailyNews.description: In a Good Friday address, President Donald Trump claimed religion is growing again in the U.S. for the first time in decades as Holy Week and Easter are celebrated.

dailyNews.title: Astronaut Victor Glover praised for saying moon mission is 'human history,' not 'Black history'
dailyNews.description: Victor Glover said the Artemis II mission represents “human history," not identity-based milestones. His remarks gained traction online and drew praise from conservatives.

dailyNews.title: Democrat governor and mayor booed at Red Sox home opener
dailyNews.description: Fans at Fenway Park booed Gov. Maura Healey and Mayor Michelle Wu at the Red Sox home opener, with footage going viral and sparking GOP reactions.

dailyNews.title: NFL clears Rashee Rice of league policy violations after probe into ex-girlfriend's abuse allegations
dailyNews.description: The NFL said Chiefs wide receiver Rashee Rice was cleared after an independent probe found insufficient evidence he violated the league’s personal conduct policy.

dailyNews.title: Artemis II astronauts nearly halfway to the moon; NASA shares stunning photos from Orion spacecraft
dailyNews.description: The four Artemis II astronauts are nearly halfway to the moon since launching Wednesday, while taking some stunning images. NASA says the mission is going well.

dailyNews.title: Lakers superstar Luka Dončić suffers season-ending injury
dailyNews.description: Luka Doncic, averaging 33.5 points per game, is out for the rest of the regular season with a hamstring strain as the Lakers prepare for the NBA playoffs.

dailyNews.title: California 4-year-old boy survives attack by coyote that bit and tried to drag him away
dailyNews.description: A 4-year-old boy had seven puncture wounds after a coyote attacked him in Southern California. The repeat offender was later euthanized.

dailyNews.title: UConn Final Four run could trigger a $50M furniture giveaway for Massachusetts-based Jordan's Furniture
dailyNews.description: Massachusetts-based Jordan’s Furniture faces a $50 million payout tied to a bold promotion if both UConn’s men’s and women’s basketball teams reach their respective title games.

dailyNews.title: Coast Guard captured on camera rescuing federal agents, boaters after 2 vessels capsize off Puerto Rico
dailyNews.description: U.S. Coast Guard and Puerto Rico police rescued three federal agents and two boaters after two vessels capsized off Isla de Cabras Tuesday night.

dailyNews.title: Trump said Iran was 'decimated.' Then an American F-15E fighter jet was shot down.
dailyNews.description: WASHINGTON — Less than 48 hours after President Donald Trump told Americans the U.S. military had “beaten and completely decimated Iran,” Tehran shot down an F-15E fighter jet, setting off a high-risk scramble by U.S. forces to rescue two service members from deep inside Iranian territory.

dailyNews.description: The president signed a similar memo last week directing pay for TSA workers.

dailyNews.title: Trump tariff fallout: Some industries grapple with lingering effects one year later
dailyNews.description: A year after his "liberation day," Trump's trade war has reshaped how companies in industries such as retail and autos are modeling economic and policy risk.

dailyNews.description: President Trump was said to be unhappy with Pam Bondi's handling of DOJ files about Jeffrey Epstein and the DOJ's failure to prosecute his political enemies.

dailyNews.description: Oil shocks crippled past presidencies. The Iran war is putting Trump into the danger zone.
